validation_rules.notes: Compare listing photos; offer partial refund or return at buyer expense
Check USPS/FedEx tracking; reship or refund if confirmed lost
Buyer pays return shipping; refund issued after gear inspection
Policy window expired; note exception for carrier damage
Cancel second order immediately if not yet shipped

context: Refund and reimbursement rules for Amanda's personal Schedule C consulting engagements — how to reconcile 1099-NEC adjustments and deductible-expense reversals for tax season.
